assertions.title: Canonical naming matches the approved product identity
assertions.reason: The latest remediation cleaned the touched canonical docs, but the active canonical spine still contains `BigBright ERP` in platform packets that are neither historical nor reference-only.

steps.expected: Current product identity uses `orchestrator-erp`, with no lingering active canonical `BigBright ERP` wording.
steps.observed: `README.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/INDEX.md`, and `docs/CONVENTIONS.md` use `orchestrator-erp`; `CHANGELOG.md` has no relevant product-identity text.

steps.action: Inspect the latest remediation commit (`604dce95a`) changed canonical docs for `BigBright` matches.
steps.expected: Touched canonical docs are fully normalized to `orchestrator-erp` unless a quote or historical/reference-only context requires the older name.
steps.observed: No `BigBright` matches remain in the 17 canonical docs changed by the remediation commit.

steps.action: Spot-check the active canonical spine for any remaining current-product `BigBright ERP` wording outside historical/reference-only contexts.
steps.expected: Old naming appears only in quoted historical contexts or explicitly non-canonical/reference-only files.
steps.observed: Two active canonical platform packets still contain `BigBright ERP`: `docs/platform/db-migration.md:5` in live prose and `docs/platform/config-feature-toggles.md:247` as the documented current MFA issuer default.

steps.action: Verify whether old-name occurrences outside the canonical spine are properly classified.
steps.expected: Any remaining old-name files outside the canonical spine are explicitly non-canonical/reference-only.
steps.observed: `docs/developer-guide.md` and `docs/migration-guide.md` still contain the old name, but both are explicitly bannered as non-canonical/reference-only.

evidence: Repo-root canonical entrypoints now use `orchestrator-erp` consistently where they describe the current backend identity.
The latest remediation commit `604dce95a` changed 17 canonical docs, and none of those files still match `BigBright`.
`docs/platform/db-migration.md:5` still says `the BigBright ERP backend` in an active canonical platform packet linked from `docs/INDEX.md`.
`docs/platform/config-feature-toggles.md:247` still documents the current `security.mfa.issuer` default as `BigBright ERP` in an active canonical platform packet.
Reference-only files with old naming remain properly classified, including `docs/developer-guide.md` (`NON-CANONICAL`) and `docs/migration-guide.md` (`RETIRED / REFERENCE ONLY`).

issues.detail: Current-product canonical prose still uses the old repo/product identity.
The canonical config packet still exposes the old product-facing MFA issuer string.

summary: Re-tested 1 repo-static assertion. VAL-DOCS-007 still fails: the touched canonical docs are clean, but the active canonical platform spine still contains `BigBright ERP` in `docs/platform/db-migration.md:5` and `docs/platform/config-feature-toggles.md:247`.
